nasb.text: You and your household shall eat it every year before the Lord your God in the place which the Lord chooses.

esv.text: You shall eat it, you and your household, before the Lord your God year by year at the place that the Lord will choose.

cnv.text: 你和你的家人，年年要在耶和華選擇的地方，在耶和華你的　神面前，吃這頭生的牲畜。

ccb.text: 每年，你们全家要去你们的上帝耶和华选定的地方，在祂面前吃这些头生的牛羊。
